summary: Full e2e testing of Math of Marketing – AI Decision Copilot app. All backend APIs and frontend pages tested and working.
critical_code_review_comments: chat_sessions is in-memory dict — will reset on server restart (by design for POC, but worth noting)
server.py is ~250 lines — acceptable for POC scope
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 12 backend tests pass. All 4 pages load correctly. Dashboard has all 7 KPI cards and 5 charts. AI Copilot uses real GPT-4o and responds correctly. Recommendations shows 5 findings + 5 actions. Simulator has 6 Radix sliders per channel and real-time chart updates work. No issues found.
